mapper.select: SELECT id, word, phonetic, meaning_cn, example_sentence, category, difficulty, 'PRIVATE' AS visibility FROM user_vocabulary_entries WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND wordbook_id = #{wordbookId} ORDER BY word ASC
SELECT word FROM user_vocabulary_entries WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND id <> #{entryId} ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT 12

SELECT v.meaning_cn FROM public_wordbook_entries m JOIN public_vocabulary_entries v ON v.id = m.public_entry_id WHERE m.public_wordbook_id = #{publicWordbookId} AND v.id <> #{entryId} ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT 12
